offer.name: Lady Whistledown - Standard
offer.description: Elevate any occasion with the enchanting Lady Whistledown bouquet, a hand-tied masterpiece of whimsical elegance and aristocratic charm. Featuring a harmonious blend of purples and whites with deep purple roses, white hypericum, white spray roses, amni, and eringium, each stem is carefully selected and artfully arranged by our skilled London florist team. Designed to leave a lasting impression, the Lady Whistledown is perfect as a gift or a sophisticated addition to your decor. Indulge in the timeless beauty and refined style of this exceptional floral creation. offer.name: Silver Baubles and Dried Fruit Christmas Wreath - 16 Inch
offer.description: This luxury Christmas wreath is made with real Nordmann fir and decorated by our expert team of London florists with silver baubles, dried apples and silver painted hard ruscus foliage.

offer.name: Classic Christmas Gift
offer.description: A table center every house would be proud of. One can just imagine dining next to this beauty and enjoying every second of it, well we certainly would anyway. The table center is made on an oasis board and comes with an extra large candle in the middle. With ever fragrant ‘Red Naomi’ roses, amaryllis, pine cones and luxury foliages – it is truly the one to behold.

offer.name: Luxury Christmas Wreath - 30cm
offer.description: A luxury Christmas wreath that is completely made and designed by our in house florists. It includes dried oranges, chillies, berries and apples, as well as cinnamon sticks, blue pine and a mix of green foilages. Please give our customer service team a call should you wish to make some changes to a selected product or have any questions. We may at times make suitable substitutions of flowers, depending on stock availability, however we always aim to notify our customers of such a change.

offer.name: Silver Star Christmas Wreath - 12 Inch
offer.description: This Christmas wreath is made with silver stars, dried oranges, cinnamons, pine cones, silver decorative rope, as well as Nordmann Fir foliages that are freshly cut from our growers. This really is a great gift Christmas wreath that will easily last throughout the festive season. All our luxury wreaths are handmade in our London florist shop by our designer florists. This wreath is finished off with a silver ribbon that can be used as a wreath door hanger.

offer.name: Strand - Standard

offer.description: Get your Christmas into full swing with one of our amazing festive wreaths. Celebrate in style and let this wreath of mini apples, pinecones and red and gold baubles transport you to a winter wonderland.

offer.name: Midwinter - 30cm
offer.description: Adorned with playful motifs, apples, succulent plants and pinecones, this wreath is a fantastic modern take on the classic form and a great way to combine the traditional Christmas decoration with something a little more playful. Perfect for display inside the house or out, the versatility and charm of this wreath will bring a smile to all who encounter it.

offer.name: Festive Fragrance - 30cm
offer.description: A wonderful design of simplicity and elegance, this wreath features baubles, red apples, cinnamon, pinecones and evergreen sprigs to create a subtle texture that is sure to delight all who visit. Don’t hesitate and order your wreath today; begin Christmas in traditional style and feel the magic of the season. Please give our customer service team a call should you wish to make some changes to a selected product or have any questions. We may at times make suitable substitutions of flowers, depending on stock availability, however we always aim to notify our customers of such a change.

offer.name: Three Kings - 30cm
offer.description: Greens and red dominate this wreath and create a cacophony of colour that compliments the composition perfectly. The timeless Christmas colours of choice, the red berries, apples and evergreen sprigs combine for a visual delight that will work brilliantly in every setting.

offer.name: Winter Sun - 30cm
offer.description: Winter is the darkest season of the year and the short days occasionally need a hint of colour to brighten the mood and bring some joy to the Christmas period. That is what we aim to do here at Flower Station and with this wreath we believe we have the perfect tonic to the wintertime blues.

offer.name: Silver and Gold - 30cm
offer.description: A beautiful and balanced composition, our Silver and Gold wreath is a classical design of simplicity and order. Comprising of silver brunia, cinnamon, silver pinecones, golden astilbe andivy, the ideal balance between colour and greenery is met as well as a harmony of textures between all the elements.

offer.name: Jack Frost - 30cm
offer.description: A bright and frosty arrangement, this wreath brings childhood memories flooding back of snowy Christmas mornings spent opening presents by the fireside. Combining evergreen foliage with stunning silver Brunia and pinecones, this wreath is the epitome of wintery charm. offer.name: Weeping Fig
offer.description: At Flower Station, we adore the Variegated Weeping Fig, also fondly known as the Ficus Starlight. Its mesmerizing almost white-green and dark green patterned leaves are sure to capture your heart. This Ficus Starlight is a true homebody, preferring stability and disliking being moved around. So, don't be alarmed if you notice some leaves falling when you relocate it or upon its initial arrival. Rest assured, with proper care, it will soon settle and flourish in its new environment. Experience the allure of the Ficus Starlight with the convenience of our London delivery and Nationwide shipping services, allowing this enchanting houseplant to grace your home with its beauty. Planted in a ceramic pot. (Approx height: 40 cms)

offer.name: Potted Calathea

With its upright, lance-shaped leaves boasting long wavy edges, it creates an eye-catching display as it gracefully spreads and forms clumps over time. The variegated leaves feature dark green strokes, while the undersides delight with a velvety burgundy red touch. You might also hear it being referred to as the Rattlesnake plant or Calathea insignis. A true gem to have in any indoor space! Pot colour and/or design vary subject to availability. offer.name: Lollipop Hydrangea - Standard
offer.description: A beautiful hydrangea plant in the shape of a lollipop. This is one of our most popular planted gifts and can be sold out quite quickly, so always make sure to order it quite early in the day. The total height of the plant is around 50cm. Hydrangeas are some of the most thankful plants that will allow themselves to be replanted for future growth. When keeping them in house they will favour a cooler room temperature. Replenish the water frequently. Change the water entirely every 2-3 days. Trim at least a half inch of stem off your flowers before you put them in a vase and each time you change the water. Keep your flowers away from heat and bright light. Avoid sitting your flowers beside ripening fruit or vegetables, especially bananas and apples. After you throw out your last arrangement, be sure to wash the vase/container very thoroughly in hot soapy water or, better yet, in your dishwasher. Use “flower food” for most flowers. Use sharp scissors when cutting.

offer.name: Lollipop Hydrangea - Deluxe
offer.description: A beautiful hydrangea plant in the shape of a lollipop. This is one of our most popular planted gifts and can be sold out quite quickly, so always make sure to order it quite early in the day. The total height of the plant is around 50cm. Hydrangeas are some of the most thankful plants that will allow themselves to be replanted for future growth. When keeping them in house they will favour a cooler room temperature. Replenish the water frequently. Change the water entirely every 2-3 days. Trim at least a half inch of stem off your flowers before you put them in a vase and each time you change the water. Keep your flowers away from heat and bright light. Avoid sitting your flowers beside ripening fruit or vegetables, especially bananas and apples. After you throw out your last arrangement, be sure to wash the vase/container very thoroughly in hot soapy water or, better yet, in your dishwasher. Use “flower food” for most flowers. Use sharp scissors when cutting.

offer.description: A stunning gift that’s perfect whenever needing to send a ‘Get Well Soon’ gesture. This tropical plant is also quite long lasting and will make for quite an easy plant to look after. The total height of the plant is around 40cm. Replenish the water frequently. Change the water entirely every 2-3 days. Trim at least a half inch of stem off your flowers before you put them in a vase and each time you change the water. Keep your flowers away from heat and bright light. Avoid sitting your flowers beside ripening fruit or vegetables, especially bananas and apples. After you throw out your last arrangement, be sure to wash the vase/container very thoroughly in hot soapy water or, better yet, in your dishwasher. Use “flower food” for most flowers. Use sharp scissors when cutting.

offer.name: Red Rose Pot - Deluxe
offer.description: Red Rose Plant The queen of all the flowers and it is no wonder to see why. If planted in the garden, roses can easily make for a very good lifetime investment.

offer.name: Aloe Vera - Standard
offer.description: A great ‘Get Well Soon’ planted gift. Aloe Vera has long known to be famous for its healing abilities that come from within its leaves. It is a plant that doesn’t need much maintenance and can keep on growing as long as it is replanted the next summer. Replenish the water frequently. Change the water entirely every 2-3 days. Trim at least a half inch of stem off your flowers before you put them in a vase and each time you change the water. Keep your flowers away from heat and bright light. Avoid sitting your flowers beside ripening fruit or vegetables, especially bananas and apples. After you throw out your last arrangement, be sure to wash the vase/container very thoroughly in hot soapy water or, better yet, in your dishwasher. Use “flower food” for most flowers. Use sharp scissors when cutting.

Trim at least a half inch of stem off your flowers before you put them in a vase and each time you change the water. Keep your flowers away from heat and bright light. Avoid sitting your flowers beside ripening fruit or vegetables, especially bananas and apples. After you throw out your last arrangement, be sure to wash the vase/container very thoroughly in hot soapy water or, better yet, in your dishwasher. Use “flower food” for most flowers. offer.name: Tremendous Dendrobium - Standard
offer.description: A tremendous planted selection of 6 of the most beautiful white dendrobium orchids in a stunning clear handmade bowl. The vase is covered in green and white moss inside and at the very top of it, making for a spectacular gift of luxury plants. Dendrobiums are available all year around and prefer lighter spots in the house with ideal temperatures between 18 and 22 Celsius. The plants should be watered once a week.

We operate a seven day delivery service in London, with same day orders taken until 5 PM. You may also book our late night, or 24 hour ,service by choosing the appropriate delivery option. offer.name: Leopard Lily
offer.description: Dieffenbachia, also known as dumb cane or leopard lily, is a tropical plant from the Araceae family. It thrives in bright, indirect light and needs watering when the soil dries out. It comes in a ceramic pot, though the pot may vary based on availability. Please note that it can be toxic to some pets. (Approx. height: 30 cm)

offer.name: Special Moment - Standard
offer.description: “Special Moment” is an arrangement that captures the essence of a fleeting, yet profound instant, frozen in time. The bouquet’s rich red roses represent passionate emotions, while the soft pink and cream roses bring a sense of calm and balance, like the harmony found in a special moment shared. The vibrant orange roses add energy and brightness, symbolizing the sparks of joy that make certain moments unforgettable. Together, these colours create a dynamic and harmonious composition, much like the layers of emotion and meaning in a singular, cherished moment. offer.name: Morning Dew - Standard

This stunning arrangement features soft pastel roses, vibrant yellow yarrow, and green hydrangeas, all delicately complemented by eucalyptus foliage. Touches of red berries add a pop of colour, bringing warmth and contrast to the bouquet’s soft and earthy tones. Perfect for brightening up any space or gifting to someone special, Morning Dew evokes the peaceful beauty of nature at dawn and will bring a breath of fresh air to any setting. offer.name: Tierra Hermosa 72% - Andean Fruits
offer.description: Decadent and exotic. Blueberries, strawberries, raspberries and blackberries harvested in the Andean mountains of Ecuador are beautifully combined with our 72% dark chocolate. Enjoy the sophisticated flavours of this cacao harvested by a small group of growers from Manabí, Ecuador. It's an ideal pairing with a delicate cheese and your favourite red wine. London Academy of Chocolate Award Winner 2021.

offer.name: Tierra Hermosa 72% - Pure
offer.description: Enjoy the sophisticated floral, fruity, nutty and caramel nuances of Nacional cacao. Intoxicating dark chocolate named "Tierra Hermosa" (Beautiful Land) after its origin Manabí, Ecuador; it's our signature chocolate. In addition to its unique flavour, this chocolate has many symbols: it evokes heritage, femininity, delicacy and provenance. London Academy of Chocolate Award Winner 2018. (Ingredients: Nacional cacao beans, cacao butter, sugar cane. Vegan, dairy-free).

offer.name: Tierra Hermosa 72% - Jipijapa Coffee
offer.description: Deep, opulent and elegant. Tierra Hermosa 72% with speciality coffee from Jipijapa, harvested in Ecuador since 1850. Speciality chocolate enhances the Nacional cacao's floral, fruity, nutty, and caramel nuances. Tree-to-bar, especially hand-selected cacao beans by a small group of growers from Manabí, Ecuador. The perfect way to finish a dinner party with a piece of this chocolate and your favourite red wine or cognac. London Academy of Chocolate Award Winner 2020.

offer.name: Tierra Hermosa 72% - Sea Salt
offer.description: Intriguing and simply delicious. Tierra Hermosa 72% with sea salt. For those who love adventurous experiences. This speciality chocolate enhances the Nacional cacao's floral, fruity, nutty, and caramel nuances. Tree-to-bar, especially hand-selected cacao beans by a group of growers from Manabí, Ecuador. It's a beautiful pairing with a single malt. London Academy of Chocolate of Chocolate 2020.

offer.name: Tierra Hermosa 72% - Cacao Nibs
offer.description: Indulge in the rustic elegance of our Cacao Nibs 72% bar, featuring crunchy, toasted cacao nibs blended into smooth dark chocolate. The nibs add a delightful texture and an intense burst of pure cacao flavor, offering a perfect balance between richness and a hint of natural earthiness.

offer.name: 18 Inch Heart x15
offer.description: Make a statement with fifth-teen 18-Inch Heart Balloons! This set of 15 heart-shaped balloons is perfect for adding extra cheer to any celebration. Whether it’s a birthday, anniversary, or just because, these balloons are a fun and vibrant way to spread love and joy!

offer.name: Video Greet — send a gift message with your order (You'll record after checkout)
offer.description: Personalize your gift with a video or audio message. The recipient opens their package, scans the QR code, and watches the video message you uploaded.

offer.name: Christmas Tree Stand 12ft
offer.description: Truly the World's favourite Christmas tree holder - for trees up to 12ft. Somehow the Cinco range has survived, flourished and is still the most popular. This is a very popular stand for many reasons, but mostly because of its practicality and ease of use. All you have to do is place the xmas tree trunk in the middle and turn the screws.We operate a seven day delivery service in London, with same day orders taken until 5 PM. You may also book our late night, or 24 hour ,service by choosing the appropriate delivery option. For rest of the UK, we operate a Tuesday to Saturday delivery service due to courier restrictions.Please give our customer service team a call should you wish to make some changes to a selected product or have any questions. We may at times make suitable substitutions of flowers, depending on stock availability, however we always aim to notify our customers of such a change.

offer.name: Luxury Metal Christmas Tree Stand
offer.description: Please remember to add a Christmas tree stand to your order if you haven't got one at home. This xmas tree stand is perfect for trees up to 7ft tall. Any more and the tree trunks of our premier Christmas trees will just be to big to fit in.

offer.name: BYOB Flower Workshop
offer.description: Come and learn how to create your very own hand-tied bouquet, The Flower School way. Perfect for all levels and a lovely way to spend the day surrounded by the season’s most beautiful blooms. You’ll be working with fresh, seasonal and luxury flowers to design a bouquet to the value of £60 - £80 (depending on how fabulous you arrange it) You can take your gorgeous creation home with you or gift it to a loved one to spread the joy of flowers! Bring your own beer (or any other preferred drink) for even more fun!

offer.name: Flower Workshop with Prosecco
offer.description: In this course you can learn how to create stunning seasonal hand-tied bouquets while enjoying a glass of prosecco. Using the season’s best flowers you will be taught the techniques and mechanics behind creating beautiful hand-tied arrangements that would be perfect for a gift or for decorating your home.

offer.name: Flower Workshop for 2 with Prosecco
offer.description: In this course you and your friend or special someone can learn how to create stunning seasonal hand-tied bouquets while enjoying a glass of prosecco. Using the season’s best flowers you will be taught the techniques and mechanics behind creating beautiful hand-tied arrangements that would be perfect for a gift or for decorating your home.

offer.name: Romantic Vase Arrangement
offer.description: In this course we will teach you how to arrange flowers in particular vases using the tape technique. Discover how this technique can give a romantic, organic and natural look to your flower arrangement.

offer.name: Flower Crown Making
offer.description: For this taster florist course, with the help of our teacher, you will explore designing and making stunning flower crowns that can be used for weddings, parties and any other special occasions. To book multiple people into the course, you can increase the number of this lesson in the basket.

offer.name: Let's Spiral Flower Workshop
offer.description: Our “Let’s Spiral” bouquet arranging course will teach you how to create a breath-taking seasonal hand-tied bouquets. The floristry course is for you if you want to add a professional look to your daily flowers or you simply want to make a gift for a friend.

offer.name: Autunm Garden Container
offer.description: Learn the art of displaying plants in a container and discover the joy of potted plants. In this class you will learn the little tips and tricks about flowers and plants and the best floral combinations. Will talk about soil, drainage and how to look after your container.

offer.name: The Art of Wreath Making
offer.description: When you think of Christmas and Christmas decorations, one of the first things that come to mind is the traditional wreath that hangs on your front door as a warming symbol of the festive period. This floristry class will give you all of the necessary knowledge and tools to become a seasoned pro in the art of wreath making. With this, you will be able to impress anybody with your magnificent wreaths. A wonderful experince to enjoy during the Festive Season. To book multiple people into the course, you can increase the number of this lesson in the basket.

offer.name: Let's Pumpkin
offer.description: Introducing our limited edition "Let's Pumpkin" flower arrangement. Celebrate the falling season creating a dramatic and fun floral arrangement in a real pumpkin.

offer.name: One Day Wedding Floral Course
offer.description: The one-day Wedding Floral Course is open to people with all levels of floristry skills, especially for beginners. Our tutors will teach you how to create beautiful wedding arrangements in a friendly atmosphere. Over this exciting day you will learn the technical skills needed to create romantic and contemporary wedding designs. We will walk you through the basics of bridal flowers from selecting them to conditioning them to designing your own bridal bouquet, buttonhole, corsage and flower girl accessory.

offer.name: Floral Tablescape Day Course
offer.description: Learn how to create an elegant tablescapes for weddings, dinner parties and your own house. Our talented florist will walk you through the different styles and possibilities, general rules and the practical creation of your own tablescape. The course is convenient for all people who want to further their knowledge in floristry - florists or total amateurs. Learn the craft of floristry at our relaxed and cosy flower school or practice online directly on your dining table.

offer.name: Seasonal Hand-Tied Bouquet & Table Arrangement
offer.description: Over the one-day Hand-Tied Bouquet Course, you will delve into the techniques of crafting hand-tied bouquets that will impress on any special occasion. Our expert florists will teach you how to look after your cut flowers and how to style a bouquet using different colours and textures. Learn the basics of floristry and bring home your fantastic creation. We offer a casual and fun environment and no previous experiences are required. Join us and spend quality time with colleagues and friends. To book multiple people into the course, you can increase the number of this lesson in the basket.

offer.name: Seasonal Wreath and Garland Making Course
offer.description: Embrace the seasons with our seasonal wreath and garland floristry course. During the day you will learn to create gorgeous wreaths and garland to decorate your front doors and home using the wiring technique and guided by our Head Florist.

offer.name: Floral Seasonal Table Arrangement
offer.description: This floristry class is suitable for anyone who just love embellishing their dinner table with seasonal flowers and delight their guests. Learn how to make this simple table arrangement for any dinner party occasion. To book multiple people into the course, you can increase the number of this lesson in the basket.

offer.name: Nordmann Fir Christmas Trees - 3ft (~90cm)
offer.description: We are particularly fond of the premier Nordmann Fir Christmas tree because they are extremely bushy, retain needles better than any other tree, and have a great shape, just like a Christmas tree is supposed to have. Please give our customer service team a call on 020 7724 7525 should you wish to make some changes to a selected product or have any questions. We may at times make suitable substitutions, depending on stock availability, however we always aim to notify our customers of such a change.

offer.name: Moet Rose 750ml
offer.description: Celebrate life’s special moments with Moët Rosé 750ml, a luxurious champagne known for its vibrant flavour and elegant presentation. Perfectly paired with a stunning bouquet, it’s a gift that exudes sophistication and charm. Disclaimer: You must be aged 18 or over to purchase this item and will be asked to confirm this at the checkout. Your recipient will also be asked for proof of age on delivery. Please enjoy the content responsibly.

offer.name: Bollinger 750ml
offer.description: Mark life’s special occasions with Bollinger 750ml, a distinguished champagne renowned for its refined taste and timeless elegance. offer.name: A Toast to Him
offer.description: Raise a glass to the man who deserves the best with our “A Toast to Him” Gift Set, designed to indulge and delight. A perfect alternative to flowers, this collection is curated for the sophisticated tastes of fathers, mentors, partners, and any special men in your life. It features a bottle of Bollinger Champagne, celebrated for its unparalleled quality and refined flavour. Paired with 3 bars of indulgent Ecuadorian chocolates, known for their silky texture and rich, and complemented by a bespoke scented candle, crafted to infuse his space with joy. “A Toast to Him” is more than just a gift, and not just for Father’s Day, its a true celebration of the person.

offer.name: A Grand Gesture
offer.description: Indulge in the ultimate expression of luxury with our “A Grand Gesture” Gift Set, curated for those who savour the finer things in life. A perfect alternative to flowers, this collection is ideal for anyone who appreciates sophistication. Featuring a bottle of Bollinger Champagne, celebrated for its unparalleled quality and refined taste, it’s complemented by our hand-selected, award-winning Ecuadorian chocolates, renowned for their silky texture and deep, indulgent flavour, packaged beautifully in a wooden box. Not to mention, our bespoke scented candle, crafted to fill your space with joy. More than just a gift, “A Grand Gesture” offers a refined experience of elegance and indulgence, perfect for people and moments that deserve to be celebrated.

offer.name: Mom's Garden
offer.description: Celebrate new beginnings with our perfect housewarming gift! This carefully curated set features an elegant white orchid plant, bringing beauty and tranquility into any home, paired with a bottle of luxury Bollinger Champagne to toast to fresh starts and memorable moments. We’ve also included our bespoke scented candle which adds a warm, cozy touch to any space. Trust us, it smells like home. Whether you're welcoming friends, family, or yourself into a new home, this gift set is perfect for adding a little zen to the moving madness.

offer.name: Bear Hug
offer.description: Get ready to squeeze some serious sweetness into someone's day with our Bear Hug gift set! This adorable teddy bear is all set to snuggle, while the delicious Cárdena chocolate bar takes indulgence to a whole new level… it’s even won some awards, how fancy! Whether it's a cosy gift for a friend or a treat just because, this set is packed with warmth, love, and a whole lot of chocolatey goodness. Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or whenever you want to share a big bear hug.

offer.name: Heartful Whisper
offer.description: Here’s to love, laughter, and happily ever after! Our Wedded Bliss gift set is the perfect mix of elegance and celebration for the newlyweds. Featuring a gorgeous White Orchid to brighten their home and symbolize their blooming love, this set also includes a bottle of crisp Prosecco to pop and toast to their exciting new chapter together. Affordable yet thoughtful, it’s the ideal way to raise a glass to their future. Whether you're congratulating the couple or sending your best wishes, Wedded Bliss brings the sparkle and charm to every celebration of love!

offer.name: Hey Baby
offer.description: Our Hey Baby Bundle is a thoughtful and heartwarming gift for a loved one. This set includes a delicate Baby’s Breath arrangement in a charming vase, a cuddly White Teddy, perfect for those warm snuggles, and a premium Cárdenas chocolate bar, renowned for its rich, indulgent flavour… a little treat for loved ones to enjoy. Whether for a baby shower, as a welcome gift or just to show someone you care, this bundle is the perfect way to share in the joy of new beginnings.

offer.name: Luxury Chocolate Trio
offer.description: When one bar is just not enough, this set offers a variety of flavours to satisfy every craving. Indulge in the ultimate chocolate experience with our Luxury Chocolate Trio, featuring three award-winning Cárdenas chocolate bars from Ecuador. Renowned for their exceptional quality and rich, smooth texture, these chocolates are a true delight for any connoisseur or sweet tooth. Perfect for gifting or treating yourself, this trio invites you to explore the finest Ecuadorian chocolate with every bite.

offer.name: Her Birthday Bloom Deluxe Gift Set
offer.description: Celebrate her special day with our delightful "Her Birthday Bloom Deluxe" gift set, thoughtfully curated to bring joy and warmth to her heart. This elegant set includes our vibrant bouquet ‘Pure Bliss’, bursting with colour and fragrance, perfect for adding a touch of natural beauty to her day. Accompanying the bouquet is are two cheerful balloons, floating gracefully to uplift the atmosphere and add a festive flair. To indulge her sweet tooth, we've included a selection of premium chocolates, hand crafted with the finest ingredients for a melt-in-your-mouth experience. This gift set is the perfect way to show her how much she means to you and to make her birthday truly memorable.Surprise her with this charming collection, designed to bring a smile to her face and make her feel cherished on her special day. Contains:• Pure Bliss deluxe size• Tortilla Chocolate set • 1 Birthday Balloon + Red Heart Balloon

offer.name: Shades
offer.description: 100 ml Shades is the ideal fragrance for independent men and women who live life on their own terms. It embraces perfumery as a true art of chemistry. At the heart of this niche perfume is the distinctive aroma molecule Iso E Super. Experience this beautifully balanced floral and woody scent, perfect for everyday wear. Ingredients: Bergamot, lime, lemon, amberwood, rose, ambroxan, musk.

offer.name: Mood
offer.description: 100 ml Mood is a unisex fragrance that blends airy jasmine notes with the warmth of saffron, enhanced by the mineral depth of grey amber and the fresh, woody essence of cedar. Ingredients: Saffron, bergamot, jasmine, cedar, ambergris, musk, vanilla.

offer.name: Waves
offer.description: 100 ml Waves opens with vibrant notes of Sicilian mandarin and grapefruit, leading into a floral heart of roses, jasmine, and lily of the valley. The base is a warm blend of cedar, vanilla, white musk, patchouli, and grey amber. A beautifully fresh and elegant fragrance, Waves is perfect for young women, making it a truly special perfume. Ingredients:Grapefruit, mandarin, rose, lily of the valley, amberwood, cedar, musk, patchouli, vanilla.

Whether it’s for a relaxing brunch, a special toast, or simply a well-deserved moment of joy, this set is the perfect way to show appreciation. Ideal for Mother’s Day, International Women’s Day, or a thoughtful birthday gift, this set is a celebration of light, florals, and relaxation. Whether it’s a cosy evening in or a moment of self-care, let the soft flicker of the candle and the vibrant beauty of mimosa create the perfect ambiance.

offer.name: Joy All Around
offer.description: Celebrate warmth and love with the Joy All Around Gift Set. Featuring our Hello Yellow Bouquet – Standard Size, bursting with radiant yellow blooms to brighten her day, a luxuriously scented Baies et Bois Candle, and a bottle of Moët Chandon for an elegant toast, this gift set is a perfect way to spoil.

offer.name: Because Mum Deserves It
offer.description: Treat Mum to a gift as special as she is with the Because Mum Deserves It Gift Set. The dreamy La La Land Bouquet, a delicate Aspen Pearl Necklace, and an indulgent a trio of award winning Ecuadorean Chocolates come together for a thoughtful and elegant surprise. A perfect blend of beauty, sweetness, and timeless grace – just like Mum!

offer.name: Thank You Gift Set
offer.description: Show someone you care with the Thank You Gift Set.This thoughtful pairing features a stunning Double Stemmed Pink Orchid, a long-lasting beauty symbolising love and strength, along with an adorable Thank You Bear to remind them how cherished they are. A heartfelt gift for someone special.

offer.name: Happy Mother’s Day - With Vase
offer.description: Make Mum’s day extra special with the Happy Mother’s Day Gift Set. A stunning Pink Anthem Bouquet, full of soft pink hues, is paired with a Mother’s Day Balloon for an extra touch of joy. To top it off, a bottle of Freixenet Prosecco adds the perfect sparkle to her celebrations. A beautiful way to say ‘thank you’ for everything she does!

offer.name: Happy Mother’s Day - Without Vase
offer.description: Make Mum’s day extra special with the Happy Mother’s Day Gift Set. A stunning Pink Anthem Bouquet, full of soft pink hues, is paired with a Mother’s Day Balloon for an extra touch of joy. To top it off, a bottle of Freixenet Prosecco adds the perfect sparkle to her celebrations. A beautiful way to say ‘thank you’ for everything she does!

offer.name: 16 Red Roses
offer.description: Red roses are the symbol of love and passion, and Letterbuds has made it easier than ever to show that. With this bouquet, you will find in the box, 16 lush red roses sourced from sustainable farms around the world.

offer.name: 16 Pink Roses
offer.description: Pink roses are perfect for displaying love and admiration. With this bouquet, you will find in the box, 16 lush pink roses sourced from sustainable farms around the world.

offer.name: Floral Elegance Mother's Day Balloon
offer.description: Celebrate Mom in style with our Floral Elegance Mother's Day Balloon! Featuring a charming floral wreath design and elegant script, this balloon adds a touch of beauty to any gift or flower arrangement. A perfect way to show your love and appreciation for the special woman in your life!

offer.name: Golden Heart Mother's Day Balloon
offer.description: Show Mom how much she shines with our Golden Heart Mother's Day Balloon! Designed with a dazzling gold and rose-gold shimmer, this heart-shaped balloon is a stunning way to express your love and gratitude. A perfect addition to any gift or floral arrangement to make her day extra special!

offer.name: Radiant Pink Mother's Day Balloon
offer.description: Add a pop of color to Mom’s special day with our Radiant Pink Mother's Day Balloon! Featuring a vibrant pink hue with charming floral and heart details, this balloon is the perfect way to show your love and appreciation. A beautiful addition to any gift or bouquet to make her feel extra special!

offer.name: All the Love
offer.description: Here’s to love, laughter, and happily ever after! Our Wedded Bliss gift set is the perfect mix of elegance and celebration for the newlyweds. Featuring a gorgeous White Orchid to brighten their home and symbolize their blooming love, this set also includes a bottle of crisp Prosecco to pop and toast to their exciting new chapter together. Affordable yet thoughtful, it’s the ideal way to raise a glass to their future. Whether you're congratulating the couple or sending your best wishes, Wedded Bliss brings the sparkle and charm to every celebration of love!

offer.name: Pure Perfection - Standard
offer.description: A vision of pure elegance, the Pure Perfection bouquet is a delicate blend of Ecuadorian White Mondial roses, pristine white hypericum, airy gypsophila, and lush Ranunculus. This timeless arrangement exudes serenity and grace, making it the perfect way to express love and appreciation. Whether you’re celebrating Mother’s Day or simply want to brighten someone’s day, Pure Perfection is a stunning choice that speaks volumes without saying a word.

offer.name: Pure Perfection - Deluxe
offer.description: A vision of pure elegance, the Pure Perfection bouquet is a delicate blend of Ecuadorian White Mondial roses, pristine white hypericum, airy gypsophila, and lush Ranunculus. This timeless arrangement exudes serenity and grace, making it the perfect way to express love and appreciation. Whether you’re celebrating Mother’s Day or simply want to brighten someone’s day, Pure Perfection is a stunning choice that speaks volumes without saying a word.

offer.name: Delicate Grace - Standard
offer.description: Soft, feminine, and effortlessly beautiful, Delicate Grace is a charming bouquet that perfectly balances sophistication and warmth. Featuring exquisite Ecuadorian White Mondial roses, blush-toned pink hypericum, and delicate gypsophila. This arrangement is a true delight. A thoughtful gift for Mother’s Day, it’s a wonderful way to show appreciation and make your loved one feel truly special.

offer.name: Delicate Grace - Deluxe
offer.description: Soft, feminine, and effortlessly beautiful, Delicate Grace is a charming bouquet that perfectly balances sophistication and warmth. Featuring exquisite Ecuadorian White Mondial roses, blush-toned pink hypericum, and delicate gypsophila. This arrangement is a true delight. A thoughtful gift for Mother’s Day, it’s a wonderful way to show appreciation and make your loved one feel truly special.

offer.name: Blue Horizon
offer.description: Hydrangeas symbolise gratitude, grace and beauty—and this bouquet brings all three to life. A stunning mix of green, white and blue hydrangeas, perfect for making a statement on any occasion and becoming the centrepiece of their new home.

offer.name: Tango Dream
offer.description: Our Tango Dream bouquet is a heart-stealer! Featuring vibrant pink roses, fiery red carnations and delicate baby’s breath, it bursts with colour and passion. Whether you're spoiling someone special or simply spreading joy, this fun and flirty bouquet sends a bold, romantic message.

offer.name: Moonlight & Stars
offer.description: For the ones you love — a radiant arrangement of white hydrangeas and roses. Symbolising the serene glow of the moon, the bold hydrangeas are paired with soft white spray roses and striking eryngium thistles, evoking a starry sky. A beautiful bouquet to express your love from here to the moon and back.

offer.name: Stargazer (Vase Included)
offer.description: Delight in the fragrance of pink lilies, artfully combined with eucalyptus cinerea greenery. Whether to brighten your home or surprise a lover of pink, this bouquet is a true joy. Please note: this arrangement is not suitable for homes with cats. Vase included.

offer.name: Sunset Delight
offer.description: Our delightful ‘Sunset Delight’ bouquet is a cheerful and charming arrangement, perfect for celebrating the beauty of every season. With 20 soft yellow garden roses, it’s a thoughtful gift for birthdays, anniversaries, or simply a heartfelt way to say thank you.

offer.name: Carnation Creation
offer.description: Treat yourself today with this stunning creation from our design team at Flower Station. A graceful pairing of pink Dianthus and delicate alstroemeria heads, beautifully complemented by seasonal foliage, this bouquet exudes elegance and class in every detail.

offer.name: Pink Kiss
offer.description: Savour the elegance of refined celebration with our hand-tied bouquet, ‘Pink Kiss’. Featuring soft pastel pink roses paired with delicate pink or white baby’s breath, this bouquet is crafted with care using the freshest, most exquisite blooms. Each stem is thoughtfully arranged to create a memorable and graceful floral gift.

offer.name: Vase of Tulips
offer.description: Classic, elegant and always in style, tulips are a firm favourite. Lovingly hand-picked by our florists and arranged in soft pastel, pink and red shades, this bunch of 25 tulips comes with a complimentary clear glass vase—perfect for showcasing their natural beauty.

offer.name: Colour Me Happy
offer.description: Celebrate the energy and freshness of the season with this beautiful bouquet of vibrant tulips. These lively blooms are perfect for brightening any space in your home. Please note: colours may vary depending on stock and availability.

offer.name: Sweet Scents
offer.description: Embrace the season with this joyful hand-tied bouquet — a fragrant mix of scented stocks, roses, snapdragons, delphiniums and touches of greenery. Its unique blend of textures and harmonious hues of pinks and blues make it a delightful birthday gift or a lovely treat for yourself.

offer.name: Hello Sunshine
offer.description: Brighten someone’s day with our ‘Hello Sunshine’ bouquet! Featuring cheerful yellow spray roses, pretty pink wax flowers, fresh eucalyptus and soft lepidium, it’s a little ray of joy that says, “You make me happy when skies are grey.” Whether you're marking a special occasion or simply reminding someone how much they mean to you, this bouquet is the perfect way to share a touch of sunshine.

offer.name: Allure
offer.description: A passionate and graceful bouquet showcasing a striking blend of velvety red roses, bi-coloured carnations, and delicate alstroemeria, all nestled amidst rich, leafy greenery. The deep crimson tones symbolise love and admiration, while soft pink highlights bring a gentle warmth and charm. Ideal for romantic gestures, anniversaries, or any moment that deserves a bold and beautiful floral statement.

offer.name: Sunset Sorbet - Standard
offer.description: Like a huge scoop of your favourite sorbet on a warm spring evening, Sunset Sorbet is a joyful explosion of colour and charm. Bursting with buttery yellow roses, candy-pink spray roses, bold hydrangeas, and beautifully ruffled carnations in a dreamy pastel palette, this bouquet is designed to brighten any space and lift any mood. Perfect for birthdays, celebrations, or simply saying “You make life sweeter”.

offer.name: Sunset Sorbet - Deluxe
offer.description: Like a huge scoop of your favourite sorbet on a warm spring evening, Sunset Sorbet is a joyful explosion of colour and charm. Bursting with buttery yellow roses, candy-pink spray roses, bold hydrangeas, and beautifully ruffled carnations in a dreamy pastel palette, this bouquet is designed to brighten any space and lift any mood. Perfect for birthdays, celebrations, or simply saying “You make life sweeter”.

offer.name: It’s a Kind of Magic - Standard
offer.description: Inspired by the legendary Queen song, this show-stopping bouquet is a true floral anthem. With dreamy blush roses, vibrant violet statice, and a chorus of striking blue hydrangeas, It’s a Kind of Magic captures that irresistible blend of drama, romance, and rock ‘n’ roll flair. Whether you’re celebrating someone unforgettable or just want to bring a little enchantment into the everyday, this bouquet hits all the right notes. Because some flowers, like great music, are simply timeless.

offer.name: It’s a Kind of Magic - Deluxe
offer.description: Inspired by the legendary Queen song, this show-stopping bouquet is a true floral anthem. With dreamy blush roses, vibrant violet statice, and a chorus of striking blue hydrangeas, It’s a Kind of Magic captures that irresistible blend of drama, romance, and rock ‘n’ roll flair. Whether you’re celebrating someone unforgettable or just want to bring a little enchantment into the everyday, this bouquet hits all the right notes. Because some flowers, like great music, are simply timeless.

offer.name: Walking on Sunshine - Standard
offer.description: Say hello to your daily dose of joy! OurWalking on Sunshine bouquet is bursting with vibrant yellow spray roses, fluffy carnations, and fresh white alstroemeria…basically the floral equivalent of your favourite feel-good anthem on full blast.This little ray of sunshine is all about good vibes, bright smiles, and dancing through life (or at least through your living room). Whether you’re celebrating a birthday, sending love to a friend, or just want to lift someone’s mood, this bunch brings the brightness in full bloom.It’s cheerful, it’s charming, and it’s unapologetically bold. So go on, spread the sunshine.

offer.name: Walking on Sunshine - Deluxe
offer.description: Say hello to your daily dose of joy! OurWalking on Sunshine bouquet is bursting with vibrant yellow spray roses, fluffy carnations, and fresh white alstroemeria…basically the floral equivalent of your favourite feel-good anthem on full blast.This little ray of sunshine is all about good vibes, bright smiles, and dancing through life (or at least through your living room). offer.name: Olive Tree
offer.description: Olive Tree (Olea europaea) Timeless, elegant, and full of Mediterranean charm. Bring a touch of the sun-soaked Mediterranean to your home or garden with our beautiful Olive Tree. Known for its silvery-green foliage and graceful shape, the Olive Tree is a symbol of peace, wisdom, and resilience. This evergreen beauty adds a sense of tranquillity and refined style to any space. Low-maintenance and drought-tolerant, Olive Trees are perfect for those who love greenery with minimal fuss. Over time, they develop a striking, gnarled trunk, giving them a sculptural, architectural presence.

offer.name: Rosé Summer - Standard
offer.description: A radiant bouquet capturing the warmth and charm of the summer season, Rosé Summer is a blend of soft blush roses, vibrant pink spray roses, carnations, and lush greenery. Inspired by long afternoons, chilled rosé, and sun-drenched gardens, this arrangement brings effortless summer elegance into any space. Whether it’s a gift or a seasonal treat for your home, Rosé Summer is sunshine in a vase. CONTAIN: x5 pink mondial ecuadorean rose, x5 two-toned hot pink spray rose, x5 red limonium, x3-5 pitto

offer.name: Rosé Summer - Deluxe
offer.description: A radiant bouquet capturing the warmth and charm of the summer season, Rosé Summer is a blend of soft blush roses, vibrant pink spray roses, carnations, and lush greenery. offer.name: Golden Hour - Standard
offer.description: A radiant celebration of summer, Golden Hour captures the soft warmth of the evening sun. Featuring buttery yellow roses, creamy white spider chrysanthemums and delicate peach carnations, this bouquet brings a golden glow to any space. A perfect gift for moments that deserve to shine.

offer.name: Summer Sangria - Standard
offer.description: Bold, juicy, and bursting with colour 🍷🌺 Summer Sangria is the floral equivalent of a warm evening shared with friends and a glass of something sweet. A lush medley of ruby red and blush roses, deep burgundy carnations, crimson alstroemeria, and pops of lemon-yellow, this bouquet is both refreshing and romantic. Perfect for turning up the heat on any celebration.

offer.description: A steadfast symbol of guidance and hope, My North Star combines soft blush pink roses, pure white blooms, and calming greenery. Inspiring. Always there.

offer.name: Endless Possibilities - Standard
offer.description: Soft, romantic, and full of promise, Endless Possibilities brings together lush peonies and delicate blush pink roses to create a timeless arrangement that whispers of new beginnings and boundless dreams. Each bloom embodies hope and optimism, making this bouquet an inspiring reminder that every moment holds the potential for something wonderful. Whether you’re celebrating a graduation, welcoming a new job, or encouraging someone embarking on a fresh journey, Endless Possibilities is the perfect way to convey your support and belief in their bright future.

Whether you’re celebrating a graduation, welcoming a new job, or encouraging someone embarking on a fresh journey, Endless Possibilities is the perfect way to convey your support and belief in their bright future.

offer.description: A bold and inspiring blend of deep mini green hydrangeas, berries, and striking red roses, our Courage bouquet captures the strength and spirit needed to face any challenge. This bouquet channels nature’s power and resilience, perfect for uplifting someone embarking on a new path or overcoming obstacles. Strong. Fearless. Unstoppable.

offer.name: Soul Sister - Standard
offer.description: Celebrate the unbreakable bond of friendship with our Soul Sister Bouquet, a stunning harmony of soft blush pink roses and rich, deep purple chrysanthemums. The gentle romance of the roses blends effortlessly with the bold, vibrant hues of the chrysanthemums, creating a bouquet that’s both elegant and full of character. Soul Sister is the perfect way to honour the connections and friendships that uplift and inspire us every day.

offer.name: Resilience - Standard
offer.description: Graceful yet strong, Resilience is a bouquet that speaks to the power of enduring beauty and quiet strength. Featuring soft pink peonies, cheerful yellow roses, fresh green mini hydrangeas, and delicate white alstroemeria, this arrangement is a symbol of hope, renewal, and perseverance. Perfect for encouraging someone through a challenging time or celebrating their strength, Resilience is a gentle reminder that even in adversity, beauty blooms. Thoughtfully named by @k_radders2019 as part of our customer competition.

offer.description: A radiant celebration of hope and beauty, Silver Lining is a bouquet that brings softness and strength together in perfect balance. Featuring dreamy blue hydrangeas, delicate pink peonies, and deep pink roses, this arrangement feels like a breath of fresh air after a storm. It's the perfect gift to brighten someone's day, lift their spirits, or simply say, "I’m thinking of you.”. offer.description: Bursting with joyful energy, Dream in Colour is a vibrant celebration of life’s brightest moments. Whether you're marking a milestone, sending love, or simply brightening someone's day, Dream in Colour is a bold expression of happiness and hope. offer.description: Elegant, joyful, and full of heart, Gratitude is a bouquet designed to say “thank you” in the most beautiful way. Bursting with soft pink roses, vibrant pink stocks, seasonal berries, and lush greenery, this arrangement radiates warmth and appreciation. offer.name: Enigmatic - Standard
offer.description: Bold and mysterious, Enigmatic is a bouquet that captivates with its unexpected harmony of colours. Featuring vibrant yellow roses, lush green chrysanthemums, rich purple stocks, and soft pink roses. This striking arrangement is both playful and intriguing, perfect for someone who loves a touch of the unexpected.

offer.name: Enigmatic - Deluxe
offer.description: Bold and mysterious, Enigmatic is a bouquet that captivates with its unexpected harmony of colours. Featuring vibrant yellow roses, lush green chrysanthemums, rich purple stocks, and soft pink roses. This striking arrangement is both playful and intriguing, perfect for someone who loves a touch of the unexpected.

offer.name: Waves of Grace
offer.description: Are you searching for a luxury gift that’s thoughtful and refined? For someone effortlessly graceful and radiant, who deserves to feel as fresh and cherished as a breeze off the Sicilian coast? Look no further. A timeless pairing of scent and bouquet, Waves of Grace combines the luminous elegance of Waves Eau de Parfum (100ml) with a graceful arrangement of fresh white lilies in a vase. Crafted by the luxury niche brand Coisy B, the perfume opens with sparkling Sicilian mandarin and grapefruit, unfolding into a romantic heart of rose, jasmine, and lily of the valley. Warm notes of cedar, vanilla, and grey amber linger softly on the skin, evoking sophistication and serenity. This set is a celebration of femininity, fresh, radiant, and effortlessly graceful, making Waves of Grace the perfect gift for someone truly special.

offer.name: Awakening
offer.description: Has someone awakened something in you? A new friendship, a blossoming love, or even a renewed sense of self? Some moments are too meaningful not to celebrate with luxury. Awakening is a harmonious gift set designed to inspire and uplift. It pairs the serene Morning Dew bouquet with the elegant Mood fragrance by luxury niche perfume house Coisy B. The bouquet blends soft pastel roses, vibrant yellow yarrow, and lush green hydrangeas, accented with eucalyptus foliage and bright red berries — capturing the quiet beauty of a peaceful morning. Complementing it is Mood, a unisex fragrance that opens with airy jasmine and fresh bergamot, layered with the warmth of saffron and cedar, and deepened by mineral grey amber and soft vanilla musk. Together, they create an experience that soothes the soul and stirs the senses. A perfect gift to celebrate growth, connection, and the beauty of new beginnings.

offer.name: Iconic Aura
offer.description: Do you know someone whose confidence and authenticity light up every room? Whose aura is truly magnetic? Celebrate their individuality and effortless style with Iconic Aura - a stunning, luxury unisex gift set featuring a vibrant bouquet of roses, stocks, and alstroemerias, perfectly paired with the uniquely balanced Shades perfume from the luxury brand Coisy B. Crafted for independent men and women who live life on their own terms, this fragrance opens with fresh citrus notes of bergamot, lime, and lemon, unfolding into a refined floral and woody heart centred on the distinctive Iso E Super molecule. Warm amberwood, ambroxan, and musk round out the scent, creating an unforgettable aura that complements every wearer.

offer.name: Graduation Hug
offer.description: The Graduation Hug is a simple yet meaningful way to say “I’m proud of you” without a bouquet. Featuring a soft, keepsake graduation bear dressed in cap and gown and a box of delicious chocolates, this gift set offers comfort, celebration, and a touch of sweetness in one thoughtful package. Whether they’re far from home or just not the flower type, this easy, heartfelt gesture is perfect for marking a major milestone with warmth and joy.

offer.name: The New Grad
offer.description: Mark the moment for The New Grad, a beautifully curated gift set designed to celebrate life’s new chapter with warmth and meaning. It includes our vibrant Fortune Favours bouquet, bursting with optimism and colour, paired with an adorable graduation bear dressed in cap. This thoughtful duo strikes the perfect balance between heartfelt and celebratory. A symbol of pride, luck, and all that’s to come.

offer.name: Bursting with Pride
offer.description: They deserve to feel just as brilliant as their future. Celebrate their success in style with the Bursting with Pride gift set, a luxurious way to mark a truly unforgettable achievement. This joyful, indulgent gift includes our radiant Pride Bouquet, a bottle of Moët & Chandon Champagne, a charming graduation bear, and luxury box of Cardenas chocolates. Perfectly packaged to say, “You did it!” with elegance and flair. You’re incredibly proud and this gift set is overflowing with love, celebration, and indulgence.

offer.name: Red and Pink Funeral Cross
offer.description: A classic funeral cross floral tribute that’s been designed with red roses that sits on a bed of luxury foliage.Complemented by clusters of waxflowers, astrantia, and carefully selected seasonal foliage, this tribute blends rich textures and romantic hues in a truly heartfelt arrangement.

offer.name: Sunlight Remembrance Wreath
offer.description: A warm and uplifting tribute, this wreath features yellow roses, white lisianthus, soft peach blooms, and vibrant yellow yarrow.

offer.name: Red and Yellow Wreath
offer.description: Bold and vibrant. This striking farewell is made with love and warmth. Featuring vivid red roses and carnations, bright yellow chrysanthemums, golden yarrow, and red hypericum berries

offer.name: Blue Baby Teddy Bear (20cm)
offer.description: Welcome a little one with our adorable 15cm Blue Baby Teddy Bear — a sweet and cuddly companion perfect for celebrating new arrivals. Pair it with a lovely flower arrangement to make your gift even more special.

offer.name: Pink Baby Teddy Bear (20cm)
offer.description: Celebrate the arrival of a baby girl with our charming 15cm Pink Baby Teddy Bear — soft, cuddly, and full of love. Pair it with a beautiful flower arrangement for an extra special touch.

offer.name: Medium Brown Bear (30cm)
offer.description: Add a warm and comforting touch to your gift with our Brown Medium Bear, soft, huggable, and perfect for any occasion. Pair it with a stunning flower arrangement to make your gesture truly memorable.

offer.name: Medium Cream Bear (30cm)
offer.description: Soft, sweet, and full of charm, our Cream Medium Bear is a delightful addition to any gift. Pair it with a beautiful flower arrangement to create a truly heartwarming surprise.

offer.name: Rosie Pink Teddy Bear (25cm)
offer.description: Meet Rosie, the softest, sweetest little companion you’ll ever cuddle! Standing at 25cm tall, this pastel pink teddy bear is the perfect gift for birthdays, baby showers, anniversaries, or just because. With her velvety paws and gentle eyes, Rosie adds a touch of love and softness to any bouquet or gift arrangement.

offer.name: Infinity & Essence
offer.description: A timeless expression of love and luxury. This exquisite gift set pairs a 55cm red Infinity Rose, a real, long-stemmed rose preserved to last over a year, with Coisy B’s “Mood” Eau de Parfum (100ml), a gender-neutral fragrance that lingers like a beautiful memory. Presented in a sleek, luxury case, the rose makes a lasting impression, perfect for anniversaries, birthdays, or simply saying “you mean the world to me.” Alongside it, discover Coisy B’s “Mood” Eau de Parfum (100ml), a sensual, gender-neutral blend of jasmine, saffron, and cedarwood, grounded by mineral ambergris and velvety vanilla. As one of the only official UK stockists of this elite niche fragrance house, we’re proud to bring you a scent that’s as exclusive as it is addictive, loved for its luxury feel, magnetic depth, and beautifully balanced composition. Whether you're celebrating a milestone or sharing a moment, Infinity & Essence is a luxurious way to say your love is everlasting.

offer.name: Bold & Beautiful
offer.description: A whimsical and enchanting fresh bouquet bursting with colour and charm. Featuring bi-colour carnations, vibrant purple alstroemeria, and bright pink spray roses, this radiant arrangement is perfect for gifting flowers on birthdays, anniversaries, or any special occasion. Lush greenery adds a fresh, airy touch, making it an ideal birthday flower or thoughtful gift to brighten someone’s day with a little magic.

offer.name: Fearless
offer.description: A striking fusion of deep magenta roses, chrysanthemums with alstroemeria and wild accents of baby’s breath. Fearles is a bouquet that dares to speak boldly. CONTAIN: x5 pink floyd ecuadorean rose, x3 burgandy chrysanthemums, x5 pink alstromeria, x4 purple lisanthus, x3 pink/purple gyp, x5-10 mix greenery

offer.name: Bear Necessities - Brown
offer.description: Life’s everyday moments call for Bear Necessities! This adorable teddy bear is ready to deliver the fluffiest bear hug imaginable, with a box of Milktray chocolates to bring the sweet side of things. Whether it’s your girlfriend on her period needing a pick-me-up, a friend feeling down after a tough week at work, or new parents juggling it all and needing a little extra TLC - this set has you covered. Curated with affordability in mind, we didn’t compromise on the cuteness factor. Hugs, chocolates, and all the feels, whatever, whenever, wherever. Just like Baloo from The Jungle Book says:"Look for the bare necessities,The simple bare necessities,Forget about your worries and your strife." Because sometimes, all you need is a bear hug, chocolates, and a little reminder that everything will be okay!

offer.name: Hydrangeas in a Hat Box
offer.description: Fluffy, dreamy, and full of charm. This hat box arrangement pairs the soft elegance of white hydrangeas with the serene beauty of blue hydrangeas. Nestled in our signature pink hat box, the design overflows with freshness and sophistication, making it a standout gift for any occasion. Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, new arrivals, or simply brightening someone’s day, these hydrangeas bring a touch of luxury and joy wherever they go. Stylish yet timeless, it’s a gift that speaks volumes without saying a word.

offer.name: Baby’s Breath in a Black Hat Box
offer.description: Soft, cloud-like gypsophila in shades of blush pink and pure white creates a dreamy, romantic display, beautifully set against the elegance of our black hat box. Simple but sophisticated, this arrangement is both modern and timeless, offering a striking contrast that makes the pastel blooms pop. Perfect as a chic gift for birthdays, celebrations, or simply to add a touch of whimsy to any space, this hat box design is a symbol of grace, beauty, and everlasting charm. Fun fact: Baby’s Breath symbolises everlasting love and purity, making it a favourite flower in weddings and celebrations around the world.

offer.name: Grandeur in a Large Hat Box
offer.description: Make a statement with our largest hat box arrangement, a luxurious cascade of white and green blooms overflowing with elegance. Housed in our signature large pink hat box, this grand arrangement exudes sophistication and style, perfect for celebrating life’s most special moments. Designed to impress, it’s the ultimate gift for birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, or simply to transform any space into a haven of natural beauty. Bold, abundant, and undeniably luxurious, this is floristry at its finest.

offer.name: Acacia Honey
offer.description: Flower Station have discovered and chosen to partner with Dixie Hunte’s Honey, a truly special family brand with a story as beautiful as their product. Their honey represents the love their mother, Dixie Hunte, who was sophisticated yet contemporary, kind, caring, and deserving of only the best. That spirit of love and quality lives on in every jar. Beautifully packaged and presented with a complimentary coaster and stirrer, this Acacia Honey makes a thoughtful gift on its own or paired with our flowers. It combines exceptional taste and quality with a meaningful backstory, making it something truly unique and special for our customers.Loved and appreciated worldwide, Acacia Honey is a monofloral honey, created predominantly from the nectar of delicate acacia blossoms. Naturally light and mild in flavour, it is not only delicious but also celebrated for its many health benefits. Key Benefits: • Easily absorbed by the body • A natural tonic rich in nutrients • Traditionally used to help relieve colds, flu, and general pain • Supports healthy digestion and liver function • Soothes coughs and sore throats • Promotes wound healing and skin recovery • May assist with healthy weight management and improved circulation We are delighted to offer this remarkable honey to our customers — a combination of outstanding flavour, thoughtful presentation, and a heartfelt story.

With its vibrant fronds and natural, airy shape, this fern instantly adds life, freshness, and elegance to any room. Perfect for brightening up living rooms, offices, kitchens, or bathrooms, ferns are loved for their classic charm and easy-going nature. Plant care: Thrives in indirect light; keep soil evenly moist Ideal for: Home décor, office desks, gifting, or adding natural freshness indoors

offer.name: Asparagus Fern in White Pot
offer.description: Delicate, airy, and full of charm, the asparagus fern is the perfect way to bring effortless greenery into your home or office. With its fine, feathery foliage and cascading shape, this plant adds a soft, elegant touch to any space. Housed in a sleek white pot, it blends beautifully with both modern and classic interiors. Easy to care for and wonderfully versatile, the asparagus fern thrives in bright, indirect light and appreciates regular watering to keep its lush look. Plant care: Prefers indirect light; keep soil lightly moist Style tip: Place on a shelf or side table to let its fronds spill gracefully over the edges Perfect for: Gifting, home styling, or adding a refreshing your indoor space A timeless choice for plant lovers, this asparagus fern brings softness and greenery to your everyday surroundings.

offer.name: Thelma & Louise
offer.description: Celebrate fearless friendship and unforgettable adventures with the Thelma & Louise bouquet. A bold and beautiful mix of lush green hydrangeas, delicate hypericum berries, spiky thistle, and soft pink roses, this arrangement captures the perfect balance of strength and elegance. Just like the iconic duo, it’s spirited, daring, and full of character. Perfect for honouring a best friend, a sister, or any kindred spirit who brings joy, laughter, and adventure into your life. CONTAIN: x3 emerlas green hydrangea, x5 pink mondial ecuardorean rose, x3 blue thistle, x5 pink phlox, x5 pink hypericum, x10-15 ruscus

offer.name: Pink Potion
offer.description: A bewitching blend of pink and purple blooms, the Pink Potion bouquet casts a spell of elegance and charm. Featuring delicate alstroemeria, lush roses, and soft carnations, each bloom is carefully arranged to create a magical swirl of colour and texture. Perfect for birthdays, celebrations, or just because, this enchanting bouquet brings a touch of fairy-tale wonder to any room. Let the Pink Potion work its magic and brighten someone’s day with beauty and grace. CONTAIN: x10 light pink african rose, x10 hot pink alstreomeria, x7 pink statice, x5 light pink carnation

offer.name: Evergreen
offer.description: The Evergreen bouquet is a celebration of timeless beauty and enduring elegance. Inspired by the lush green hues of nature that remain vibrant all year round, this arrangement features sumptuous green hydrangeas, delicate white hypericum berries, and soft pink roses. Each bloom is carefully chosen to create a harmonious balance of freshness, texture, and gentle colour. Why Evergreen? Because it evokes a sense of lasting beauty, vitality, and renewal. Like the evergreen trees that retain their beauty through every season, this bouquet symbolises enduring charm, elegance, and the timeless joy of giving flowers. STANDARD: x3 emerald green hydrangeas, x4 shimmer ecuadorean rose, x5 pink lisianthus, x5 white limonium, x5 white hypericum, x5-7 greenbell DELUXE: x7 emerald green hydrangeas, x7 shimmer ecuadorean rose, x7 pink lisianthus, x7 white limonium, x7 white hypericum, x7-10 greenbell

offer.name: Te Amo
offer.description: Whisper your love with the Te Amo bouquet. Lush roses, delicate thistle, and charming hypericum come together in a passionate embrace, capturing the corazón of romance. Perfect for anniversaries, declarations, or simply saying “I love you,” this enchanting arrangement brings a touch of Spanish amor to every bloom. CONTAIN: x5 Paloma ecuadorean rose, x5 light pink spray rose, x4 white thistle, x5 red hypericum, x10-15 mix greenery

offer.name: Aphrodite’s Garden
offer.description: Step into a world of romance and enchantment with our Aphrodite’s Garden bouquet. Inspired by the goddess of love and beauty, this arrangement blends soft pastel tones with lush pink roses, delicate statice, golden solidago, and fragrant stocks, all intertwined with wispy eucalyptus. The result is a wild, effortlessly romantic garden feel, full of texture, movement, and charm. Each bloom is thoughtfully arranged to evoke grace, allure, and the timeless beauty of nature in its most delicate form. Perfect for celebrations of love, heartfelt gestures, or simply to bring a touch of ethereal elegance into any space. Who is the goddess of love and beauty in your life? Send this to them… hint, hint. CONTAIN: x10 light pink african rose, x5 solidago, x5 light pink statice, x5 purple limonium, x5 purple stock, x5-10 eucalyptus

offer.name: Sixth Kiss From A Rose
offer.description: A timeless expression of elegance, Sixth Kiss From A Rose features six lush Ecuadorian white roses, hand-selected for their rich colour and luxurious bloom. Arranged simply in a sleek vase, this bouquet exudes sophistication and grace - perfect for saying “I love you” or adding a touch of refined beauty to any space.

offer.name: Lavender Skies
offer.description: A dreamy blend of soft hydrangeas, delicate roses, and striking lisianthus, lifted with bursts of vibrant purple blooms. Lavender Skies is the perfect balance of elegance and playfulness, like a summer evening where pastel clouds meet a glowing twilight sky. This bouquet is ideal for birthdays, celebrations, or simply to brighten someone’s day. CONTAIN: x4 blue select hydrangeas, x5 purple stock, x5 lilac ecuadorean rose, x3 light pink spray rose, x3 pink lisianthus, x3 blue thistle , x3 eucalyptus

offer.name: Falling In Love
offer.description: Warning: this bouquet may cause autumnal butterflies. With burnt-orange chrysanthemums, dashing blue thistles, and flirtatious red berries, it’s got “love interest in a rom-com” energy. Gift it when: You’ve caught feelings. Or when you want to make someone think you have.

offer.name: Dancing Queen

Green bell foliage keeps it fresh, because even fire needs balance.Gift it when: You want to say “You set my world on fire.” Or when someone just aced life and deserves flames in floral form. 🔥🔥🔥 CONTAIN: x5 orange spray rose, x5 orange alstroemeria, x5 red hypericum, x5 wild pitto, x5 ruscus, x5 greenbell

offer.name: Twinkle Toes

offer.name: Evening Serenade

CONTAIN: x3 spider burgandy chrysanthemums, x3 orange spray rose, x10 15 greenbell + eucalytpus

Inspired by the timeless charm of Frank Sinatra’s “Come Fly With Me” — this bouquet is all about sweeping someone off their feet and jetting off to somewhere new (even if it’s just in spirit).“Come fly with me, let’s float down to Peru”...okay, maybe not Peru, but this bunch will make them feel just as special.Gift it when: Someone’s about to embark on a new chapter: a trip, a job, or a fresh start. offer.name: Howzat!
offer.description: Celebrate the season with the Howzat Gift Set. Featuring our Hello Yellow Bouquet, Standard Size, bursting with radiant yellow blooms to brighten her day, a luxuriously scented Baies et Bois Candle, and a bottle of Moët Chandon for an elegant toast, this gift set is a perfect for this season.

offer.name: A Lovely Innings
offer.description: Celebrate new beginnings with our perfect housewarming gift! This carefully curated set features an elegant white orchid plant, bringing beauty and tranquility into any home, paired with a bottle of luxury Bollinger Champagne to toast to fresh starts and memorable moments. We’ve also included our bespoke scented candle which adds a warm, cozy touch to any space. Trust us, it smells like home. Whether you're welcoming friends, family, or yourself into a new home, this gift set is perfect for adding a little zen to the moving madness.

offer.name: Grand Stand
offer.description: Do you know someone whose confidence and authenticity light up every room? Whose aura is truly magnetic? Celebrate their individuality and effortless style with Grand Stand - a stunning, luxury unisex gift set featuring a vibrant bouquet of roses, stocks, and alstroemerias, perfectly paired with the uniquely balanced Shades perfume from the luxury brand Coisy B.Crafted for independent men and women who live life on their own terms, this fragrance opens with fresh citrus notes of bergamot, lime, and lemon, unfolding into a refined floral and woody heart centred on the distinctive Iso E Super molecule. Warm amberwood, ambroxan, and musk round out the scent, creating an unforgettable aura that complements every wearer.

offer.name: In Full Swing - Standard
offer.description: An exquisite bouquet to celebrate all the ‘In Full Swing' with flowers. Experience the enchantment of vibrant cerise pink roses, captivating purple stocks, and graceful pink spray roses, beautifully blended to create a delightful bouquet that is guaranteed to brighten the day of its lucky recipient. Crafted exclusively by Flower Station, this romantic hand-tied bouquet was inspired by the esteemed West End revival of Andrew Lloyd Webber's acclaimed musical, ‘In Full Swing’, currently captivating audiences at London’s Lyric Theatre until November 2023.
