Available for delivery in London and nationwide, it is an ideal choice for any occasion that calls for a touch of sophistication and love.

offer.name: The Hat-Trick
offer.description: Introducing our "The Hat-Trick", an exquisite arrangement of red roses, red hypericum berries, red carnations and purple limonium, beautifully presented in a chic black hat box. Romantic and sophisticated, this stunning flower arrangement is perfect for any occasion. Available for delivery in London or nationwide, it's the ideal choice to bring a touch of romance and elegance wherever it is received.

offer.name: Fabulous Six
offer.description: Sometimes the simplest is the best. These six luxurious grand prix long stem roses are delicately wrapped with salal, berries and curly willow branches and displayed in a vase.

offer.name: I Love You - Milk Chocolate - 50g
offer.description: Say ‘I love you’ the sweetest way possible. This creamy milk chocolate bar is crafted with care and wrapped in our unique bold design that speaks from the heart. A small but meaningful gesture, perfect for reminding someone just how much they mean to you. With Tony’s Chocolonely, every bite is delicious and supports a fairer, more ethical chocolate industry.

offer.name: Congrats - Milk Chocolate, Caramel, Sea Salt - 50g
offer.description: Celebrate their big moment with something irresistibly delicious. This bar blends creamy milk chocolate with golden caramel and a hint of sea salt - crafted to make every achievement taste even sweeter. The perfect pocket-sized gift to mark promotions, exams, or milestones. And with Tony’s Chocolonely, your gift helps support a fairer chocolate world.

offer.name: I Love You - Milk Chocolate, Pretzel Toffee - 180g
offer.description: Go big on love with this generous, flavour-packed bar. Smooth milk chocolate meets crunchy pretzel toffee for a treat that says ‘I love you’ in the most unforgettable way. Ideal for anniversaries, thoughtful gestures, or simply surprising someone special. As always, Tony’s Chocolonely champion a fairer, more responsible cocoa industry and we are so happy to partner with them to be able to share this product with us customers - making your gift meaningful in more ways than one.

offer.name: You Are The Sweetest - Everything Bar- 180g
offer.description: Let them know just how sweet they truly are with this indulgent Everything Bar. A celebration of all things delicious, rich chocolate, irresistible textures, and the signature Tony’s touch. Perfect for birthdays, thank-yours, or moments that deserve a little extra sugar. Cheeky, funny, and guaranteed to bring a smile. Warning: not suitable for pets… or anyone who can’t handle maximum sweetness.

offer.name: Potted Orange Guzmania
offer.description: Bright, bold, and effortlessly tropical - our Orange Guzmania brings a burst of sunshine to any space. With its vibrant orange flower bracts and glossy green leaves, this striking plant adds instant warmth and colour to your home or office.

offer.name: Potted Red Guzmania
offer.description: Add a touch of exotic elegance to your space with our Red Guzmania. Its striking crimson flower bracts rise proudly from lush green foliage, creating a stunning contrast that instantly brightens any room.

offer.name: Twenty20
offer.description: Fast, fun, and full of colour, just like the game it’s named after. Our Twenty20 bouquet brings Lord’s iconic colours to life with vibrant purple statice, veronica, and lisianthus, paired with bold red-orange alstroemeria for a burst of energy in every stem, creating a joyful, uplifting mix made to brighten any moment. Whether it’s a celebration, a thank-you, or just a pick-me-up, Twenty20 delivers colour and spirit from the very first glance.

offer.name: Silent Night Selection
offer.description: Create a moment of calm this Christmas with our Silent Night Selection. This thoughtful duo pairs Flower Station’s signature scented candle with our elegant Silent Night bouquet, an arrangement designed to bring serenity, warmth, and a touch of seasonal magic to any home. The perfect gift for those who cherish peaceful winter evenings.

offer.name: Santa's Favourite's
offer.description: Bring festive cheer to someone special with Santa’s Favourites. This charming gift set includes a soft medium brown teddy bear, a beautifully fragranced Flower Station candle, and our Merry Bright bouquet bursting with joyful seasonal colour. A delightful combination guaranteed to spread smiles all season long.

offer.name: Naughty List
offer.description: Indulge someone (or yourself!) with our luxurious Naughty List gift set. Featuring a bottle of Moët Champagne, a rich Cardenas chocolate bar, and our Winter Solstice bouquet, this trio is made for those who like their Christmas celebrations a little bit extra. Go on, you deserve it.

offer.name: Thanks a Bunch
offer.description: Say a heartfelt thank you with a gift that speaks for itself.Thanks a Bunch includes our enchanting My North Star bouquet paired with a 50g Tony’s Chocolonely bar printed with the message “Thanks a Bunch”. A sweet and thoughtful way to show your appreciation.

offer.name: Sweet Baby Girl
offer.description: Welcome a precious new arrival with our Sweet Baby Girl gift set. This adorable collection features a soft pink teddy bear, our Orchid Elegance arrangement presented in a beautiful pink hatbox, and a 180g “Yeah Baby!” Tony’s Chocolonely bar. A tender and celebratory gift for new parents.

offer.name: Birthday Bliss
offer.description: Make their day beautiful with Birthday Bliss. This joyful set includes our sunny Buttercup Bouquet paired with a 180g Tony’s Chocolonely “Happy Birthday” bar. A bright and delicious way to celebrate a special moment.

offer.name: Adore You
offer.description: Show your love in the sweetest way with Adore You. This romantic pairing includes our passionate Fire For You bouquet alongside a 180g Tony’s Chocolonely bar that says “I LOVE YOU”. A perfect gift for anniversaries, date nights, or spontaneous declarations of love.

offer.name: Pumpkin Spice - Standard
offer.description: Introducing Pumpkin Spice, a bouquet that encapsulates the very essence of autumn. Bursting with warmth, texture, and captivating seasonal colour, this arrangement is designed to bring the cosy charm of crisp October days straight into your home. Featuring stunning shades of burnt orange, deep burgundy, and vibrant red, Pumpkin Spice blends premium roses, carnation blooms, hypericum berries, and seasonal spray roses with an abundance of striking autumn leaves. The result is a beautifully layered bouquet full of movement, richness, and depth. Perfect as an autumnal centrepiece, a heartwarming gift, or a seasonal treat for yourself, Pumpkin Spice celebrates everything we love about the fall season—comfort, colour, and a touch of rustic magic.

offer.name: Pumpkin Spice - Deluxe
offer.description: Introducing Pumpkin Spice, a bouquet that encapsulates the very essence of autumn. Bursting with warmth, texture, and captivating seasonal colour, this arrangement is designed to bring the cosy charm of crisp October days straight into your home. Featuring stunning shades of burnt orange, deep burgundy, and vibrant red, Pumpkin Spice blends premium roses, carnation blooms, hypericum berries, and seasonal spray roses with an abundance of striking autumn leaves. The result is a beautifully layered bouquet full of movement, richness, and depth. Perfect as an autumnal centrepiece, a heartwarming gift, or a seasonal treat for yourself, Pumpkin Spice celebrates everything we love about the fall season—comfort, colour, and a touch of rustic magic.

offer.name: Berry Sunset - Standard
offer.description: Warm your senses with our Berry Sunset bouquet, a rich and festive arrangement that captures the essence of the season. Featuring shimmer roses, coral pink spray roses, pink limonium, red hypericum, and red alstroemeria, beautifully paired with seasonal greenery, this bouquet is a vibrant blend of warmth and elegance. Inspired by the comforting aroma and deep hues of mulled wine, each bloom is carefully arranged to evoke cozy evenings, festive gatherings, and joyful celebrations. Perfect for gifting or brightening your home with a touch of seasonal magic. STANDARD: x5 kahala ecuadorean roses, x5 red limonium, x3 coral spray rose, x5 red alstroemeria, x10-15 mix greenery DELUXE: x7 kahala ecuadorean roses, x5 red limonium, x5 coral spray rose, x7 red alstroemeria, x15 mix greenery

offer.name: Winter Solstice
offer.description: Embrace the beauty of the season with Winter Solstice, a rich and atmospheric bouquet crafted to mirror the depth, colours, and textures of winter. Designed by our expert florists, this arrangement brings together an elegant blend of cream roses, deep red alstroemeria, vibrant green hypericum berries, sculptural eryngium thistles, and abundant seasonal foliage. The cool blues of the thistles contrast beautifully with the warmth of the red blooms, while eucalyptus and lush greenery add movement, fragrance, and a natural winter woodland feel. The result is a bouquet that is both striking and sophisticated, perfect for adding a touch of seasonal magic to your home or gifting to someone who appreciates unique, textural floristry. Whether displayed as a festive centrepiece or given as a thoughtful winter gift, Winter Solstice captures the essence of the colder months: crisp, elegant, and full of quiet beauty. CONTAIN: x10 white african rose, x5 blue thistle, x6 green hypericum, x6 red alstroemeria, x10 eucalyptus, x5 pitto

offer.name: Christmas Tree Stand 4ft
offer.description: Truly the World's favourite Christmas tree holder - for trees up to 4ft. Somehow the Cinco range has survived, flourished and is still the most popular. This is a very popular stand for many reasons, but mostly because of its practicality and ease of use. All you have to do is place the xmas tree trunk in the middle and turn the screws.We operate a seven day delivery service in London, with same day orders taken until 6 PM. You may also book our late night, or 24 hour ,service by choosing the appropriate delivery option. For rest of the UK, we operate a Tuesday to Saturday delivery service due to courier restrictions.Please give our customer service team a call should you wish to make some changes to a selected product or have any questions. We may at times make suitable substitutions of flowers, depending on stock availability, however we always aim to notify our customers of such a change.

offer.name: Tierra Hermosa: An Ecuadorian Tale of Chocolate (Limited Edition Book)
offer.description: A beautifully crafted and thoughtful work by Susana Cárdenas, Tierra Hermosa is the perfect and most special gift for any chocolate lover. It will also resonate with anyone who values roots, resilience, and the enduring power of family. Ideal for fans of historical fiction, Latin American literature, and sweeping, character-driven stories. This exclusive bilingual edition, launched in October 2025, is a limited print run. Bringing together 21 journalistic chronicles, the book is told from deeply human and feminine perspectives, weaving multiple voices to narrate the past and present of cocoa and its origins along Ecuador’s coast. Through interviews with archaeologists, historians, cocoa producers, chocolate makers, gastronomy leaders, women at the heart of cocoa, and international experts, Tierra Hermosa celebrates the people, knowledge, and traditions that have shaped the world of chocolate. Through its tender and evocative storytelling, the book explores cocoa’s impact on Ecuador’s economy, history, and soul, moving from the personal to the universal and highlighting the lives connected to this treasured crop.

offer.name: Tierra Hermosa Indulgence Set
offer.description: This beautifully crafted gift set by Susana Cárdenas is the perfect and most special present for any chocolate lover. It combines her exclusive bilingual book, Tierra Hermosa, with her Luxury Chocolate Box Gift Set, which includes six bars of Susana’s award-winning chocolate, so you can indulge in exquisite chocolate as you read. The book itself is a limited print run, launched in October 2025, and brings together 21 journalistic chronicles told from deeply human and feminine perspectives. Weaving multiple voices, it narrates the past and present of cocoa and its origins along Ecuador’s coast. Through interviews with archaeologists, historians, cocoa producers, chocolate makers, gastronomy leaders, women at the heart of cocoa, and international experts, Tierra Hermosa celebrates the people, knowledge, and traditions that have shaped the world of chocolate. Through tender and evocative storytelling, the book explores cocoa’s impact on Ecuador’s economy, history, and soul, moving from the personal to the universal and highlighting the lives connected to this treasured crop.

offer.name: Award Winning Craft Beer Gift Set
offer.description: We’re proud to stock this exceptional collection from Tap Social. The perfect gift for craft beer lovers, this set not only delivers incredible flavour but also supports Tap Social’s mission to reduce reoffending and help turn lives around. Every purchase makes a real difference. Inside the beautifully presented gift box, you’ll find one 440ml can of each of Tap Social’s award-winning beers. Each can features bold, original artwork created by a prisoner at HMP Huntercombe, a striking reminder of the real community impact behind every brew. What’s Inside – Award-Winning Beers 1) Time Better Spent – 5.1% Juicy IPA • 2 Stars at The Great Taste Awards 2025 • Bronze Medal at the SIBA Bottle & Can Awards 2023 2) Inside Out – 5.5% Oatmeal Stout • Gold Medal at the SIBA Bottle & Can Awards 2023 • Best in Category – South East Region at the SIBA Bottle & Can Awards 2023 3) False Economy – 4.8% Craft Lager • Bronze Medal at the SIBA Bottle & Can Awards 2023 4) Jobsworth – 3.4% Pale Ale (GF) • 1 Star at The Great Taste Awards 2025 A meaningful, memorable gift for any craft beer enthusiast — and a celebration of flavour, creativity, and second chances.

offer.name: Alcohol Free Craft Beer Gift Set
offer.description: The perfect gift for anyone who enjoys a flavourful, well-crafted beer without the alcohol — and every purchase directly supports our mission to reduce reoffending and help turn lives around. Great taste with real impact. This beautifully packaged gift box includes four 440ml cans of Day Release, our refreshing 0.5% alcohol-free pale ale. Each can features bold, striking label artwork created by a prisoner at HMP Huntercombe, celebrating creativity, second chances, and meaningful change. What’s Inside Day Release – 0.5% Alcohol-Free Pale Ale Our very first alcohol-free brew, Day Release is clean, balanced, and incredibly easy to drink. Lightly hopped with Sultana, it offers bright citrus notes and a crisp, refreshing finish — proof that low-alcohol beer can still be full of character. A thoughtful, uplifting gift for mindful drinkers, designated drivers, beer lovers, or anyone who wants great flavour without the booze. Vegan friendly.

offer.name: Gluten Free Craft Beer Gift Set
offer.description: A thoughtful and delicious gift for gluten-free beer lovers — and every purchase helps support our mission to reduce reoffending and turn lives around. This set brings together two standout brews, each crafted with care, creativity, and real social impact.Inside the box you’ll find two cans of Jobsworth, our award-winning gluten-free pale ale, and two cans of Major Figures, our crisp, easy-drinking lager. Both feature striking label artwork created by a prisoner at HMP Huntercombe, highlighting the importance of rehabilitation, family support, and second chances.What’s InsideJobsworth – 3.4% Gluten-Free Pale AleWinner of 1 Star at The Great Taste Awards 2025A bright, refreshing, gluten-free pale ale brewed with Azacca and Amarillo hops for fruit-forward aromas and a lightly bitter finish. At just 3.4%, Jobsworth is easy-drinking yet full of character, a perfect choice for anyone seeking flavour without compromise.440ml | GF | Vegan friendlyMajor Figures – 4% LagerClassic • Crisp • LightBrewed with 100% barley malt and hopped with Admiral and Hallertauer Tradition, Major Figures is a clean, crisp lager with a smooth finish. Balanced, refreshing, and endlessly drinkable — a timeless favourite elevated with purpose.440ml | 4% ABV | Vegan friendly

offer.name: Short-Stemmed Blue Infinity Rose
offer.description: A short-lasting gift: a blue short-stemmed preserved rose, makes an ideal present for your significant other. Perfect for special occasions like birthdays or anniversaries, this gift allows you to express your boundless appreciation and affection. These genuine preserved roses retain their natural appearance and delicate texture for over a year.

offer.name: Black Infinity Rose Short Stem
offer.description: A short-lasting gift: a black short-stemmed preserved rose, makes an ideal present for your significant other. Perfect for special occasions like birthdays or anniversaries, this gift allows you to express your boundless appreciation and affection. These genuine preserved roses retain their natural appearance and delicate texture for over a year.

offer.name: New Baby Boy Gift Set with Flowers Bouquet and Bear
offer.description: Celebrate the arrival of a new baby boy with this delightful gift set. This lovingly curated bundle combines our elegant Divine bouquet with charming keepsakes to mark the special occasion. The Standard set includes the bouquet in a standard size alongside a small cuddly blue teddy bear and a cheerful It’s a Boy balloon. For an extra touch of luxury the Deluxe set features a larger bouquet paired with a large white teddy bear plus both an It’s a Boy balloon and a red heart balloon. It is a thoughtful and stylish way to send your congratulations.

offer.name: Get Well Soon Flower Bouquet, Bear and Balloon Gift Set
offer.description: Send a heartfelt message of support with this uplifting gift set. It includes our vibrant Sweet Nancy bouquet which is sure to brighten up any room. We have paired the flowers with a cheerful Get Well Soon bear and a matching balloon to lift spirits. This thoughtful bundle is the perfect way to show you care and bring a little sunshine to friends or family feeling under the weather.

offer.name: Chloe Mediumship Bouquet
offer.description: The Chloe Mediumship Bouquet is a deeply symbolic arrangement created to honour connection, guidance, and new beginnings. Designed with intention and meaning by the incredible Chloe Smith herself at Flower Station HQ, this bouquet brings together soft whites and natural textures to create a calm, uplifting presence. At its heart of the bouquet are five white Ecuadorian roses chosen to represent purity, love, and reverence. These are complemented by white veronica, thistle, and green bells, adding clarity, grounding and good fortune, while white limonium and ruscus provide remembrance, strength and support What makes this bouquet truly unique are Chloe's special symbolic features: two delicate white butterflies, representing transformation and hope, and a single white feather, symbolising spiritual guidance and protection. Each bouquet also includes Chloe’s signature robin postcard, making it a meaningful gift unlike any other. Thoughtfully designed to mark moments that deserve to be held with care and intention, we are proud to offer the Chloe Mediumship Bouquet — the perfect gift for reflection, sympathy, or celebrating a new chapter.

offer.name: Flower Arrangements in a Vase - Online Course
offer.description: Nothing is more valuable and fundamental to floristry than the simple art of putting flowers in a vase. It sounds easy enough, but the extremes of someone doing this for the first time with no prior knowledge versus an experienced florist typically yield a big difference in results. The aim of arranging flowers in a vase is to maximise the aesthetic impact of the flowers. When using many varieties, colours, and sizes of flowers and foliage, you want each stem to compliment the next. It can be a fine balancing act but when you master this technique, it’s one that will no doubt serve as the cornerstone of your flower arranging future. In this course, you will learn how to match flowers combinations as well as vase designs in order to give your house a true outdoor floral feeling.

offer.name: Wedding Flowers Masterclass - Online Course
offer.description: What is more fun and special than preparing the wedding flowers for a close friend or family member or even yourself! Immerse yourself in the world of beauty and romance and combine the two by creating some beautiful creations and learning to do everything from vase work, table arrangements and centerpieces, bridal bouquets, buttonholes, and much more in this truly immersive course.

offer.name: 100 Red Rose Bouquet
offer.description: Experience the epitome of elegance with our bouquet of 100 luxurious red African roses, artfully hand-tied and accented with a touch of natural greenery. This stunning arrangement is perfect for adding a romantic flair to any setting. Available for delivery in London and nationwide, it is an ideal choice for any occasion that calls for a touch of sophistication and love. This bouquet has beautiful long 100 stemmed roses (50 cm).

offer.name: Wiring Masterclass - Online Course
offer.description: If you ask any florist to name just a few of the most important skills that they use in their day-to-day jobs they will undoubtedly list wiring as one of them. So many of the incredible floral designs that you see are created using this versatile technique. In this masterclass, Zita, one of the top florists at the well-known London florist shop, Flower Station will guide you through working with different flowers and the best wiring techniques that pros use to get the most out of them. Ultimately, Zita will take you from wiring zero to wiring hero.

offer.name: Lifetime Full Membership - Online
offer.description: The lifetime membership gives you on-demand, unlimited access to all of the current Flower School Online content. Have all of your favourite online floristry courses in one place and learn, whenever you want.

offer.name: The Art of Seasonal Wreath Making - Online Course
offer.description: A wreath is a typically circular base of foliage and flowers usually associated with Christmas that many people hang on their front door over the festive periods. However, in recent times, wreaths have become more popular year-round with many people opting to make and display them on other occasions such as the start of spring, Easter, birthdays, and even the start of autumn/winter. They are a truly versatile accessory, that is not only a delight to look at but also, as you will learn in this course, fun to make. In this course, The Art of Seasonal Wreath Making, Sofia from Flower School Online is going to give you all of the necessary knowledge and tools to become a seasoned pro in the art of wreath making. With this, you will be able to impress anybody with your magnificent wreaths. The basis of this course will be focused on the Christmas wreath using classic elements such as berries, pine needles, and pine cones. However, using the knowledge you have gained, you will be able to expand on this for any occasion, for example, on Easter you could use eggs and bunnies instead.

offer.name: Large Urn Flower Arrangement Masterclass - Online Course
offer.description: For weddings and events, nothing is more impressive than a large urn flower arrangement as a centrepiece. It is a real show stopper. In this course, Zita will guide you how to arrange fresh flowers in large urns for any special occasions of yours.

offer.name: Let's Spiral - Online Course
offer.description: The spiral technique is the basis for all hand tied bouquets. For some people, it is quick and easy to learn and for others, it needs some practice. Once mastered, you can make bouquets yourself from scratch and really impress your friends and family. This really is the fundamental technique that florists learn and the benefit is that not only can you create gifts for friends but this is also a great way of preparing flowers for a vase. This applies to complexed mixes of colours and textures to simple collections of single types of flowers that just gives an elegant and lovely look.

Featuring shimmer roses, coral pink spray roses, pink limonium, red hypericum, and red alstroemeria, beautifully paired with seasonal greenery, this bouquet is a vibrant blend of warmth and elegance. Inspired by the comforting aroma and deep hues of mulled wine, each bloom is carefully arranged to evoke cozy evenings, festive gatherings, and joyful celebrations. Perfect for gifting or brightening your home with a touch of seasonal magic. STANDARD: x5 kahala ecuadorean roses, x5 red limonium, x3 coral spray rose, x5 red alstroemeria, x10-15 mix greenery DELUXE: x7 kahala ecuadorean roses, x5 red limonium, x5 coral spray rose, x7 red alstroemeria, x15 mix greenery

offer.name: Fragrant Spring - 春馥
offer.description: Soft blush meets deep crimson in a bouquet that whispers romance without trying too hard. Lush red and pink roses nestle together in perfect harmony, accented by delicate textures and fresh greenery, like a love story told in flowers. - Whether it’s a quiet “I adore you,” a celebration of us, or a moment that deserves tenderness, Just, Lovely says it all. Simply romantic. Undeniably lovely. 💕

offer.name: Cheers to You, Mum
offer.description: Bouquet: Featuring soft blush pink roses, pure white blooms, and calming greenery. Chocolate Box

offer.name: Mother’s Sweet Treat
offer.description: Bouquet: Delightfully fragrant pink Stargazer lilies beautifully combined with eucalyptus cinerea greenery to brighten a Mother’s Day. Keep in mind this arrangement is not cat-friendly, so be cautious where you place it. Vase included. Chocolate Box

offer.name: Golden Hour Gift Set
offer.description: Bouquet: The delightful 'Lemon Drizzle' bouquet is a charming and cheerful arrangement, ideal for celebrating Mother’s Day. It showcases x20 yellow african roses, x10 pink limonium Chocolate Box

offer.name: Bloom & Bubble’s Deluxe Gift Set
offer.description: Bouquet: There's always a reason to remind that special someone why they matter, and what better way to do it than with this vibrant bouquet in shades of yellow, cream, and pink that's sure to bring joy on Mother’s Day. (Standard size) Freixenet Italian Prosecco 75cl I love you Tony’s Chocolonelly Bar - 180g

offer.name: Serenity Gift Set
offer.description: Bouquet: Experience the joy of flowers with a beautiful arrangement made with white hydrangeas, beautifully displayed in a clear fishbowl. Elegance and style put together. An exclusive candle from Flower Station scented with delicate notes of berries, geranium, rose and jasmine, showcasing the finest fragrances from the world of flowers, created by those who know it best.

offer.name: Home is Her Gift Set
offer.description: Fragrant mix of scented purple stocks, African pink roses, snapdragons, delphiniums and touch greenery. Wonderful combination of textures, harmony and colours perfect for Mother’s Day. Experience irresistible indulgence with Lindt Lindor Milk Chocolate Truffles – smooth, creamy centres wrapped in a delicate milk chocolate shell. Expertly crafted by Lindt’s Master Chocolatiers, each truffle delivers a moment of pure bliss in every bite. An exclusive candle from Flower Station scented with delicate notes of berries, geranium, rose and jasmine, showcasing the finest fragrances from the world of flowers, created by those who know it best.

offer.name: White Bloom & Luxe Chocolate Set
offer.description: Bringing together a classic white hydrangea bouquet paired with award-winning Cárdenas artisanal Ecuadorian chocolate. A thoughtful and beautiful choice for Mother’s Day. Our white hydrangea bouquet features five premium white hydrangeas, softened with fragrant eucalyptus for a fresh, natural finish. Paired alongside is the exquisite Torquilla Handwoven Case of chocolates by Susana Cárdenas. Beautifully crafted and presented, this special collection includes six bars of Susana’s award-winning chocolate. Every bar is a tribute to Ecuador’s history, its communities, and its future. It tells a story of craftsmanship, heritage, and care. Elegant, refined, and beautifully indulgent.

offer.name: Artisinal Indulgence Set
offer.description: Kentia & Ivy Bowl, award-winning Ecuadorian chocolate and our signature No.55 candle. Luxurious Mother’s Day gift designed to last. Our Kentia & Ivy Bowl features mini Kentia palms and trailing ivy, beautifully arranged in a contemporary planter. A gift that continues to grow long after Mother’s Day. Paired alongside is the exquisite Torquilla Handwoven Case of chocolates by Susana Cárdenas. Beautifully crafted and presented, this special collection includes six bars of Susana’s award-winning chocolate. Every bar is a tribute to Ecuador’s history, its communities, and its future. Completing the gift is our exclusive No.55 candle. A signature scent named after our flagship store at 55 Park Road, where Flower Station began over 20 years ago. Handcrafted with delicate notes of berries, geranium, rose and jasmine, it fills any space with a beautifully layered floral fragrance created by those who know flowers best. Elegant, meaningful, and designed to be enjoyed well beyond the day itself. A truly special way to celebrate Mum.

offer.name: The Divine Gift Set
offer.description: A striking bouquet of blue hydrangeas and white roses paired with our signature No.55 candle. Bold, elegant, and unforgettable for Mother’s Day. The Divine bouquet is designed to impress. Composed of rich blue hydrangeas, white Avalanche roses, green dianthus, and lush seasonal foliage, it creates a beautifully balanced arrangement full of texture and depth. Completing the gift is our exclusive No.55 candle. A signature scent named after our flagship store at 55 Park Road, where Flower Station began over 20 years ago. Handcrafted with delicate notes of berries, geranium, rose and jasmine, it fills any space with a beautifully layered floral fragrance created by those who know flowers best. Elegant and expressive, this set is a wonderful way to celebrate Mums. Standard size includes: 5 blue select hydrangeas, 5 African white roses, 7 green carnations, Pittosporum and Greenbell.

offer.name: Mum, You’re Tremendous
offer.description: Three magnificent white orchids paired with Cárdenas Luxury Ecuadorian chocolate. Lasting floral elegance and rich indulgence for Mother’s Day. Tremendous Orchids is a statement of timeless beauty. This magnificent planted arrangement includes three extra-large white orchids set in a handmade glass vase, finished with luscious moss. A long-lasting favourite of many of our customers, it’s a gift that never fails to impress. Paired with four bars of Cárdenas award-winning chocolate presented in a beautifully crafted wooden box. Each bar celebrates Ecuador’s fine flavour cacao and the craftsmanship behind it. Sophisticated, thoughtful and designed to be enjoyed well beyond the day itself.

offer.name: Princess Izabella Celebration Gift Set
offer.description: A bouquet fit for royalty, paired with prosecco, Lindt truffles and a cuddly keepsake. The perfect way to celebrate Mum in true style this Mother’s Day. Bouquet combining the delicate beauty of blush pink carnations with the bold elegance of deep red roses. Lush green foliage adds vibrant contrast, creating a bouquet that feels both soft and striking. Standard size includes: 10 African red roses, 8 pink carnations, 5–10 ruscus and 5 pittosporum. To make the celebration even more special, this gift set includes irresistibly smooth Lindt Lindor Milk Chocolate Truffles, Freixenet Italian Prosecco (75cl) and a cuddly teddy bear (20cm). Elegant, generous and full of warmth.

offer.name: Grand Ocean Gift Set
offer.description: A florist favourite paired with Moët & Chandon and our signature No.55 candle, a truly luxurious Mother’s Day celebration. This hand-tied bouquet is a true showstopper. Featuring ocean song roses, pale pink dahlias, white nigella, pink astilbe, white cow parsley, peach hypericum, astrantia and seasonal foliage, it’s a beautifully layered arrangement full of texture and movement. A favourite among our own florists, the combination of tones and textures creates an effortlessly elegant and sublime finish. Standard size includes:9 purple roses, 9 dahlias or chrysanthemums, 7 pink asclepia (or similar), 7 peach hypericum, 7 pink astrantia with luxury greenery. Paired with a 750ml bottle of Moët & Chandon Champagne and our exclusive No.55 candle. Scented with delicate notes of berries, geranium, rose and jasmine, it fills the room with a refined floral fragrance created by those who know flowers best. What a memorable way to honour Mum this Mother’s Day.

offer.name: Queen’s Choice
offer.description: A vibrant bouquet paired with Bollinger champagne and Ferrero Rocher. Beautifully elevated for Mother’s Day. Passionate pink and white chrysanthemums, delicate spray roses, blooming limonium and seasonal foliage come together in a radiant blend of colour and texture. Full of warmth and vibrancy, it’s a joyful arrangement fit for a queen. Standard size includes: 3 white chrysanthemums, 3 pink chrysanthemums, 3 pink spray roses, 3 two-toned light pink roses, 6 solidago, light purple limonium and green bell. Paired with a 750ml bottle of Bollinger Champagne, renowned for its refined taste and timeless elegance. To complete the indulgence, we’ve included delicious Ferrero Rocher pralines, bringing a touch of sweetness and luxury to every delivery. Elegant, generous and celebratory, a wonderful way to treat Mum this Mother’s Day

offer.name: Best of the Best
offer.description: A joyful bouquet paired with Moët & Chandon and Tony’s Chocolonely dark chocolate. A thoughtful reminder of just how special she is. A sweet and uplifting bouquet designed to brighten any space. Featuring bright pink dianthus, purple alstroemerias and elegant pink spray roses, softened with seasonal foliage, it brings colour, warmth and effortless charm. Paired with a 750ml bottle of Moët & Chandon Champagne and a bar of Tony’s Chocolonely dark chocolate with crunchy almonds and a hint of sea salt. Ethically sourced and packed with intense flavour. Bright, generous and full of celebration.

offer.name: Mum’s Sunshine Suprise
offer.description: A vibrant bouquet in joyful yellow and pink tones, paired with our signature No.55 candle and classic Dairy Box chocolates. A bright and thoughtful Mother’s Day gift. Including a vibrant arrangement full of warmth and colour created exclusively by our skilled florists paired with our exclusive No.55 candle. A signature scent named after our flagship store at 55 Park Road, where Flower Station began over 20 years ago. Handcrafted with delicate notes of berries, geranium, rose and jasmine, it fills any space with a beautifully layered floral fragrance created by those who know flowers best. For some extra sweetness, also find a box of classic Dairy Box chocolates helping create a beautiful balance of fragrance, sweetness and celebration. There’s always a reason to remind someone how much they matter and this radiant gift set does exactly that. Standard size includes: 5 pink stocks, 5 white/pink alstroemerias, 5 African yellow roses, yellow solidago and pink limonium with seasonal foliage.

offer.name: Blush Bloom Mother’s Day Heart Balloon
offer.description: A beautifully soft and elegant Mother’s Day heart balloon featuring delicate blush roses, white blooms and lilac accents. The romantic floral design surrounds a graceful “Happy Mother’s Day” message, making it the perfect finishing touch to any bouquet or gift. Feminine, timeless and full of charm — this balloon pairs beautifully with pastel arrangements and luxury flower boxes. A lovely way to make Mum feel truly celebrated.

offer.name: Bright Garden Mother’s Day Heart Balloon
offer.description: A vibrant and joyful Mother’s Day heart balloon bursting with colourful watercolour florals. Featuring a bold “Happy Mother’s Day” message surrounded by bright botanical illustrations, this design brings energy and happiness to any gift. Perfect for adding a playful pop of colour to your bouquet, it’s a cheerful way to show Mum just how much she means to you.

offer.name: Mimosa Sunrise - Pink
offer.description: This petite arrangement features fluffy stems of vibrant mimosa—nature’s little bursts of sunshine—beautifully gathered in a soft pink bud vase and finished with a delicate ribbon. Mimosa flowers have long been a symbol of appreciation and solidarity, traditionally gifted to honour the women who inspire us.Perfect for desks, bedside tables, or thoughtful gifting, this cheerful arrangement is a small but meaningful way to celebrate International Women’s Day—a bright reminder of resilience, friendship, and the power of women lifting each other up.

offer.name: Mimosa Sunrise - Grey
offer.description: This petite arrangement features fluffy stems of vibrant mimosa—nature’s little bursts of sunshine—beautifully gathered in a soft pink bud vase and finished with a delicate ribbon. offer.description: A timeless expression of elegance, our Single Infinity Rose Head is presented in a luxury customised perspex case, designed to preserve beauty for years to come. The crystal-clear acrylic display showcases the rose from every angle, creating a refined and modern keepsake that requires no maintenance. Finished with bespoke branding, this piece makes a truly unique and luxurious gift, perfect for celebrating meaningful moments and lasting impressions.

offer.description: Crisp, clean and quietly beautiful. Neighbourhood Watch Bouquet
offer.description: Celebrate the spirit of community with our exclusive Neighbourhood Watch Bouquet. This striking arrangement features vibrant yellow African roses and deep blue thistle, perfectly reflecting the iconic brand colours of the Neighbourhood Watch. Whether you are welcoming a new neighbour to the street, thanking a local volunteer, or simply brightening your own home, this hand-tied bouquet is a meaningful way to show appreciation for the people who keep our communities safe and connected.

offer.description: Show your love in the sweetest way with Adore You. This romantic pairing includes our passionate Fire For You bouquet alongside a 180g Tony’s Chocolonely bar that says “I LOVE YOU”. A perfect gift for anniversaries, date nights, or spontaneous declarations of love.

offer.name: Peace Lily in a white pot
offer.description: Bring a sense of calm and natural elegance into any space with our beautiful Peace Lily in a White Pot. Renowned for its lush green foliage and graceful white blooms, the Peace Lily is one of the most popular indoor plants, loved for both its beauty and easy-care nature. The Peace Lily thrives in bright, indirect light and is known for helping to improve indoor air quality, creating a fresher and more relaxing environment.
